topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Exchange sync for Bitunix (and comparable connectors) must ingest futures and other non-spot account balances/positions—not spot wallet only—so wealth and portfolio views reflect total exchange holdings.

backend/src/exchanges/bitunix.rs (spot-only sync_balances, enabled_futures=false default, empty sync_positions/sync_funding stubs); backend/config/default.toml [exchanges.bitunix]; ExchangeConnector trait sync pipeline; wealth upsert_daily_snapshot and portfolio PnL; optional parity with binance fapi paths and bybit unified wallet labeling.

Read-only API keys only (R-0032); Bitunix futures uses fapi.bitunix.com header auth distinct from spot query-sign (R-0058); BUG-0003 G1/G2 registry+auth track separate; US-0007 spot-first MVP deferred futures—operator now requires futures for accurate wealth; do not read .env secrets.

With Bitunix credentials and operator futures balance present: post-sync exchange holdings include futures/margin product_type rows (not spot-only); connection test documents spot+futures reachability or explicit partial failure; wealth snapshot crypto_value_eur reflects futures wallet; regression: spot-only keys still sync spot path; Binance/Bybit unchanged unless discovery expands scope.

Operator confirms Bitunix futures/margin balances appear in Wealth and exchange holdings after sync; product no longer spot-only for Bitunix when futures enabled; BUG-0005 acceptance rows M+N+O pass on US-0010 external profile; discovery documents endpoint/auth mapping per R-0058.

decomposition.rationale: Operator requirement that Bitunix exchange sync must cover futures and other account types—not spot wallet only—for accurate wealth; sub-defects M (spot-only ingestion), N (futures API/auth gap per R-0058), O (wealth under-report) share one connector/product scope.
alternatives_considered: Extend BUG-0003 G2 futures auth spike only — rejected: G2 targets test-connection auth, not product requirement to sync futures balances into wealth
US story for multi-product exchange — rejected: defect-shaped gap vs US-0007 spot-first MVP promise; operator reports missing holdings today
